item.title: We Bought a Tractor We Said Never
item.description: See why we purchased a tractor we never expected to own, exploring its features, challenges, and how it fits into our farm operations.

media:content.media:title: We Bought a Tractor We Said Never
media:content.media:description: See why we purchased a tractor we never expected to own, exploring its features, challenges, and how it fits into our farm operations.

item.title: Mad Dougo Moment
item.description: Catch the moment Dougo shows his frustration, capturing reactions, humor, and the story behind why he’s mad.

media:content.media:title: Mad Dougo Moment
media:content.media:description: Catch the moment Dougo shows his frustration, capturing reactions, humor, and the story behind why he’s mad.

item.title: Planter Upgrades: Time for the Torch
item.description: Watch as we upgrade the planter using welding and modifications, improving performance and efficiency for planting season.

media:content.media:title: Planter Upgrades: Time for the Torch
media:content.media:description: Watch as we upgrade the planter using welding and modifications, improving performance and efficiency for planting season.

item.title: We Had a Farm Accident
item.description: A look at a farm accident, detailing what happened, how it was handled, and safety lessons learned to prevent future incidents.

media:content.media:title: We Had a Farm Accident
media:content.media:description: A look at a farm accident, detailing what happened, how it was handled, and safety lessons learned to prevent future incidents.

item.title: First Day in the Field Adventure
item.description: Join us on the first day in the field, exploring new equipment, tasks, and challenges while starting an exciting farming adventure.

media:content.media:title: First Day in the Field Adventure
media:content.media:description: Join us on the first day in the field, exploring new equipment, tasks, and challenges while starting an exciting farming adventure.

item.title: Harvest Continues Despite Road Work
item.description: See how harvest operations carry on smoothly even with road construction, highlighting strategies and teamwork to keep crops moving efficiently.

media:content.media:title: Harvest Continues Despite Road Work
media:content.media:description: See how harvest operations carry on smoothly even with road construction, highlighting strategies and teamwork to keep crops moving efficiently.

item.title: This Will Get the Neighbors Talking
item.description: Watch a surprising or bold project that’s sure to catch attention, sparking conversation and curiosity among neighbors and passersby.

media:content.media:title: This Will Get the Neighbors Talking
media:content.media:description: Watch a surprising or bold project that’s sure to catch attention, sparking conversation and curiosity among neighbors and passersby.

item.title: Why We Don’t Plow Anymore
item.description: Discover the reasons we’ve stopped plowing, including soil health, efficiency, and alternative farming methods that save time and improve productivity.

media:content.media:title: Why We Don’t Plow Anymore
media:content.media:description: Discover the reasons we’ve stopped plowing, including soil health, efficiency, and alternative farming methods that save time and improve productivity.

item.title: This Repair Won’t Be Cheap
item.description: A look at a costly repair, detailing the problem, parts, and labor involved while highlighting the challenges and decisions in fixing equipment or machinery.

media:content.media:title: This Repair Won’t Be Cheap
media:content.media:description: A look at a costly repair, detailing the problem, parts, and labor involved while highlighting the challenges and decisions in fixing equipment or machinery.

item.title: Time for New Projects: Machinery Shuffle
item.description: Watch us prepare for new projects by moving and organizing machinery, ensuring everything is ready for efficient and productive work on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Time for New Projects: Machinery Shuffle
media:content.media:description: Watch us prepare for new projects by moving and organizing machinery, ensuring everything is ready for efficient and productive work on the farm.

item.title: Doug to the Rescue: Stuck in Snow
item.description: Watch as Doug comes to the rescue when Grandpa gets stuck in the snow, showcasing quick thinking, teamwork, and problem-solving in winter conditions.

media:content.media:title: Doug to the Rescue: Stuck in Snow
media:content.media:description: Watch as Doug comes to the rescue when Grandpa gets stuck in the snow, showcasing quick thinking, teamwork, and problem-solving in winter conditions.
